summary: Restored MCP and package auth metadata to Kit's X-Kit-Api-Key API-key header.
reason: Kit's spec includes multiple auth schemes, but this printed CLI is intentionally configured and live-verified with the X-Kit-Api-Key header. MCP install and manifest metadata must match the runtime client.
validated_outcome: publish validate passed; live dogfood quick passed with KIT_API_KEY without printing the key or account data.
